title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial on running Claude Code locally for free using Ollama and open-source LLMs like Qwen 3.5. The guide covers installation, configuration, and building an agentic AI travel application with Flask backend and HTML/CSS frontend.
